# Copilot workspace instructions

- Project: Streamlit bridge bidding trainer for 2/1 Game Force opening-bid and response practice.
- Keep code small, typed where practical, and beginner-friendly.
- Prefer deterministic rule explanations over opaque ML decisions.
- Current scope: random deals, hand evaluation, opening-bid and response recommendations, feedback, and session statistics.
- Run validation with `python -m compileall .` from the project root after code changes.

## Setup checklist

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
- [x] Scaffold the Project
- [x] Customize the Project
- [x] Install Required Extensions: none required by this setup
- [x] Compile the Project
- [x] Create and Run Task: VS Code tasks created
- [ ] Launch the Project
- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
